case_title: JENNIFER NAEGELE VS. EXPEDIA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER NAEGELE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY SIBEL ABREU, SENIOR PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CAROL O'ROURKE, MANAGER OF CUSTOMER RELATIONS AMERICAS. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAEGELE, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC. BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC $5,705.76 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,860.76, EACH DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2852.88 AND SHARED COSTS ($77.50 EACH) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE:NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS);(FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED NOV-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (HEARING: JAN-12-2022 AT 10AM) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NAEGELE, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC. BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER NAEGELE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC. IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY SIBEL ABREA. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY CAROL O'ROURKE. THE COURT ALLOWS DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS' ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE MAR-02-2022 HEARING. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. UNTIMELY.
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);(AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORP) SERVED NOV-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
